task.name: spy_volatility_universe_spy_us_equity_vix3m_index_spy_vix_linkage
task.core_query: Propose a theorem linking SPY US Equity and VIX3M Index through spot-volatility coupling, realized variance scaling, and regime transitions.

evidence.response:
Best supported answer:
We now show how a straightforward application of Theorem 9.2 gives a model-free expres- sion for the mgf of log S , the variance swap, and the forward-starting variance swap. As for the practical interest, if S = S 0eX represents the SPX index, and ∆is 30 days, we get the joint mgf of SPX, the variance swap, and VIX2. Forward variances are tradable assets (unlike spot variance), constituting a family of martingales indexed by their individual time horizons T.

- [book] Rough Volatility.pdf | page 137 | chunk 2 | score=0.468
  To calibrate VIX option smiles via rough volatility, we consider extended lognormal models by adding volatility modulation through an independent stochastic factor in the Volterra integral which preserves part of the analytical tractability of the lognormal setting by extending it through an affine structure, which makes it possible to develop approximate option pricing and calibration algorithms based on Fourier transform techniques.
- [book] Algorithmic and High-Frequency Trading, Mathematics, Finance, Cartea.pdf | page 60 | chunk 2 | score=0.466
  Moreover, traders would rather purchase the SPY than acquiring all the 500 assets in the index, since it is (much) cheaper to do so, and removes the costs associated with constantly rebalancing one's portfolio to match changes in the weights the different assets represent in the S&P500. Another variable is the volatility index VIX: the VIX is an index continu­ ously published by the Chicago Board of Options Exchange which is designed to measure the market's expectation on future short-term volat
- [book] Rough Volatility.pdf | page 77 | chunk 4 | score=0.463
  The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) is given by a computation that approximates the square-root of the fair strike of a one-month variance swap on the S&P index The variance swap is a forward contract on realized variance, the fair strike of which is given by Z T Vt(T) = ξt(u)du. t Volatility is the square-root of variance so, for example, instantaneous volatility is the square- root of instantaneous variance.

Supporting excerpts:

As for the practical interest, if S = S 0eX represents the SPX index, and ∆is 30 days, we get the joint mgf of SPX, the variance swap, and VIX2.
[S2] Continuous-Time Asset Pricing Theory, A Martingale-Based, Jarrow.pdf p.394: A+Bxm Then, substitution into the beta model Theorem 87, and algebra gives the ﬁnal result cov[Rj, ηrm] cov[Rj, rm] E[Rj] = E [ηrm] = E [rm] . 17.8 Notes There has been much written on the static CAPM and the mean-variance efﬁcient frontier.
[S3] Continuous-Time Asset Pricing Theory, A Martingale-Based, Jarrow.pdf p.8: Hedging and exact replication (second fundamental theorem) 3. The meaning of diversiﬁcation (third fundamental theorem and the law of large numbers) 8.
